title: Copy, paste, cut, undo, redo
drDigitalIntro:
Here are the moves you'll use every day.
• Ctrl+C copies; Ctrl+V pastes; Ctrl+X cuts.
• Ctrl+Z undoes; Ctrl+Shift+Z redoes.
• Ctrl+A selects everything.

playgroundTask.instructions: Copy the text below, then paste it into the box.

drDigitalSuccess: Nice work! Copy and paste will save you so much time from here on out.
drDigitalHint: Select the text first — click and drag across it — then use Ctrl+C to copy and Ctrl+V to paste.
